name: ROUTE 32
_layout: Phase 7 BOUNDARY STUB — the road south out of Violet, opened by beating KAMON at the gate. Route 32 proper is later content; this is the current end-of-chapter boundary. Entered from the north (fromViolet at 4,1); the only exit is the warp back north (4,0) → VIOLET:fromRoute32. A sign marks the end of built content.
